personal.name: Michael Barkaloff
personal.tech: Go (Core), Rust, Python, PostgreSQL, ClickHouse, Redis Streams, gRPC, Docker
personal.description: Specializing in building scalable backends and resilient data architectures. Focused on performance optimization, asynchronous data processing, and high-availability systems. I don't just write code; I design systems that handle growth.

stack.title: Technical Expertise
stack.stack_pg_desc: Complex transactional data and query optimization
stack.stack_crdb_desc: Distributed SQL and global fault tolerance
stack.stack_redis_desc: Caching and real-time processing via Streams

experiences.title: Professional experience
experiences.experiences_0_description: Architected and successfully delivered a production-ready system with automated updates and maintenance. Focused on long-term stability and fault tolerance in the Telegram ecosystem.
experiences.experiences_1_description: Developed a high-traffic Telegram WebApp featuring a custom game engine, cryptocurrency integration, and a scalable referral system handling concurrent user growth.
experiences.experiences_2_description: Built an automated sales funnel including a merch store, quiz engine, and complex admin dashboard for real-time inventory and user management.

process.title: Work process
process.step_0_description: We analyze your business goals to define technical requirements, choose the optimal stack, and design a data architecture ready for future scaling.
process.step_1_description: I provide a clear project outline with a technical roadmap, milestones, and transparent pricing. Once confirmed, we move forward.
process.step_2_description: A 30–50% upfront payment secures the project. I begin building the core backend, integrations, and logic according to the agreed plan.
process.step_3_description: You receive regular updates at key milestones. We use feedback to fine-tune performance and ensure everything meets the high-load standards.
process.step_4_description: After final approval and remaining payment, I deliver a fully tested, launch-ready system with all necessary documentation and handovers.

projects.title: Key projects
projects.projects_0_description: A scalable gaming platform designed for high concurrent user counts. Implemented WebSocket-based real-time state synchronization with Redis consistency.
projects.projects_1_description: Massive notification system with advanced queue management. Designed to ensure delivery consistency and prevent API rate-limiting via Redis Streams.
